s3objectlambda.accesspoint.transformatio: A configuration used when creating an Object Lambda Access Point transformation.

s3objectlambda.accesspoint.transformatio.Description: A container for the action of an Object Lambda Access Point configuration. Valid inputs are `GetObject`, `HeadObject`, `ListObject`, and `ListObjectV2`.

A container for the content transformation of an Object Lambda Access Point configuration. Can include the FunctionArn and FunctionPayload. For more information, see [AwsLambdaTransformation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/API/API_control_AwsLambdaTransformation.html) in the *Amazon S3 API Reference*.
